eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Grays Harbor; Pacific, WA; at 9:50 PM on JUN 9, 2026 Effective until 12:50 AM JUN 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is Grays Harbor County conducting a test of the Emergency Alert System. In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you important information. The following tones will conclude this test.
